name: OLD DOMINION FREIGHT LINE, INC.
business: Old Dominion Freight Line is one of the largest North American less-than-truckload (LTL) motor carriers. It provides regional, inter-regional and national LTL services through a single integrated, union-free organization. Over 98% of its revenue comes from transporting LTL shipments for customers whose demand is tied to industrial production and the U.S. domestic economy.

exposures.sentence: We are one of the largest North American less-than-truckload ( LTL ) motor carriers.

Our information technology systems are subject to cyber and other risks, some of which are beyond our control, which could have a material adverse effect on our business, results of operations and financial position.
We currently incorporate AI solutions into our business, and these applications may become more important over time.

catalysts.sentence: We currently estimate capital expenditures will be approximately $265 million for the year ending December 31, 2026.
